new_entries.product: Webcol Alcohol Prep pad (70% isopropyl alcohol) 2 ply, 200 count boxes, Cardinal Health 200 LLC 3651 Birchwood Drive, Waukegan, IL 60085.
new_entries.reason: Microbial Contamination of Sterile Products: Affected lots have been deemed non-sterile following discovery of a contaminant (Paenibacillus phoenicis), which may pose a potential infection risk to vulnerable groups.
new_entries.user_facing_note: ⚠️ FDA Recall N/A by Cardinal Health 200, LLC for Webcol Alcohol Prep pad (70% isopropyl alcohol) 2 ply, 200 count boxes, Cardinal Health 200 LLC 3651 Birchwood Drive, Waukegan, IL 60085.: Microbial Contamination of Sterile Products: Affected lots have been deemed non-sterile following discovery of a contaminant (Paenibacillus phoenicis), which may pose a potential infection risk to vulnerable groups. (classification Not Yet Classified). Penalty: -15.0 pts.
